scripts.dev:sagemaker: cd packages/frontend && SAGEMAKER=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/codeeditor/default/absports/3000 npx next build && (SAGEMAKER=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_PATH=/codeeditor/default/absports/3000 npx next start -p 3001 & node scripts/sagemaker-proxy.mjs)
scripts.deploy:dev: cd packages/infra && npx cdk deploy --context env=dev
scripts.deploy:prod: cd packages/infra && npx cdk deploy --context env=prod
scripts.synth: cd packages/infra && npx cdk synth --context env=dev
